final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo for an autumn/winter fashion e-commerce hero banner, featuring a model in a camel wool coat.

Style/medium: fashion editorial photography, premium brand campaign aesthetic
Composition: full-body shot with model walking toward camera, slight low angle, medium telephoto lens for flattering proportions
Subject: model wearing camel-colored wool overcoat, relaxed confident stride, natural movement in fabric
Scene/backdrop: urban street covered with fallen autumn leaves, late afternoon setting
Lighting/mood: warm golden hour backlight, sun flare from behind, soft rim light on coat edges, cozy and elevated atmosphere
Color palette: warm amber and honey tones as base, camel coat as anchor, golden highlights, muted browns and oranges from leaves
Materials/textures: visible wool texture with natural weave, crisp fallen leaves with dry edges, soft bokeh in background
Avoid: oversaturated colors, harsh flash, plastic-looking fabric, generic stock photo feel, watermark, text overlay
